title: Nickel-aluminosilicate catalysts for ethylene oligomerization: recent scientific progress

authors.name: Vasile Hulea
authors.affiliation: Charles Gerhardt Institute of Montpellier, University of Montpellier, CNRS, ENSCM, 1919 Rte de Mende, 34293 Montpellier Cedex 5, France

abstract: <jats:p>The recent progresses in the ethylene conversion catalyzed by Ni-aluminosilicates, including types of catalysts depending on the support, active sites, oligomerization mechanism and kinetics and catalyst deactivation are examined in this review.</jats:p>
